title: CVE-2025-71343: picklescan RCE
summary: [P1] picklescan before 0.0.30 fails to detect malicious pickle files that exploit lib, with no patch available. This vulnerability has a high risk score due to its potential for arbitrary code execution. Why now: Reported attribution (unverified): None (confidence: 0.80)
classification_reasoning: This vulnerability allows for arbitrary code execution, which is a classic example of rce.
